# CodeCrab

[![Development Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/status-in%20development-orange)]()
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
[![Tech Stack](https://img.shields.io/badge/Tech-React%20Native%20%7C%20Expo-blue)]()
[![AI Assistant: DeepSeek](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI%20Assistant-DeepSeek-blue?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)]()
[![AI Assistant: Claude](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI%20Assistant-Claude-D97757?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)](https://www.anthropic.com/claude)

## Core Concept

Mobile Claude Code GUI client that eliminates the need for terminal:

- Connect to a remote Claude Code instance running on a server
- View task execution progress (streaming output)
- Approve/deny Claude Code's operation requests (permission confirmation)
- Browse file tree and view file contents
- Start new tasks and switch projects

## Tech Stack

- React Native
- Expo

## Project AI Assistants

- DeepSeek
- Claude (Anthropic)
